title: Warlery's Turrets
body:
### The World is getting conquered by vanilla monsters!, so it's to defend your base or house with 11 Types of Turrets and Weapons with Posibility to Upgrade them!.


- PLEASE, INSTALL "JEI" FOR SEE AL RECIPES!
- PLEASE, INSTALL "GECKOLIB" FOR COMPATIBILITY FOR ANIMATIONS!

  
_ATENTION: This mod are a lite version of Warlery's HQ, in this version we only have Turrets, temporally turrets, miniturrets and weapons, NO enemies and npcs, no structures, no bosses, no raids, etc._

_vanilla mobs now loot some items from the mod, this is make for compatibility to other mods and make easier to obtain the turrets and create your base more faster!._

_the weapons now have infinity durability, same upgrade method, same damage.

Turrets:
- Machine Gun Turret
- Sniper Turret
- Mortar Turret
- Bull Cannon Turret
- Cannon Turret
- FlameTurret
- Miniturret
- Minimachinegun

Temporally turrets like:
- Deploturret
- Blowerturret
- HeadHunter turret
- 
Weapons like:
- Riot Hammer
- Jacks Gun
- Caliber Gun
- Caliber Axe
- Lifeore Gun
- Magma Claws
- Enginner Hammer

## Enjoy your exploration!, kill some monsters and upgrade your house!.


![defend you base!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cbc51ceec063ac84d195b49e4f015c127b69f2d.webp)

Enjoy! :)
